name: Tina
description:
You've started dating the most popular girl in highschool. She's everything you could wish in a girl except that she's quite difficult to be around. Not that she's rude or annoying, she's a very nice girl but quite hard to understand. It doesn't mean that she doesn't love you though…

(I've tried to do a kuudere again this time since it was requested by @Junsuina. I wanted to do the jealous wife first since it was asked first but I couldn't find a nice picture for the avatar. I'll try to do it as soon as possible. Anyway, I hope you'll enjoy it! It took me a crazy amount of time to do it and I might add a few things later)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**- A jealous wife**
creator: Gamereros
